problem_summary: Manual Adjustment automation misses or skips several premium/correction rows because fetch/category/filter logic is too rigid and sometimes overrides remarks sync/match status. Remarks tokens must decide whether a row is missing/different and eligible for input.

user_sample.remarks: KOREKSI PANEN | (DE0004AB1) (DE) POTONGAN PREMI - (DE) POTONGAN PREMI | 88172 | sync:MISS | match:MISMATCH
user_sample.expected: Include in preview/run as input-needed because remarks sync is MISS and match is MISMATCH.

current_repo_findings: app/ui/main_window.py parses remarks sync/match tokens but _record_is_mismatch only reads verification status.
app/ui/main_window.py records_requiring_fetch_verification checks premium categories and stale miss, not all explicit remarks mismatch rows.
app/ui/division_run_dialog.py has grouped premium branch for premi/premi_tunjangan plus query.requests_premium; category-specific premi_tiket/pupuk needs audit.
configs/adjustment-categories.json includes premi_tiket but lacks PUPUK/TABUR tokens.
app/core/api_client.py grouped premium normalization flattens metadata detail rows and should be preserved.
runner/src/plantware/page-actions.ts depends on detail_type/subblok/vehicle_code for premium detail behavior.
reference_project_findings: backend/src/utils/manualAdjustmentRemarkParser.ts defines remarks format and explicit sync/match token parsing.
backend/src/services/manualAdjustmentService.ts maps POTONGAN_KOTOR/KOREKSI to DE0004 and (DE) POTONGAN PREMI.
backend/src/services/manualAdjustmentService.ts uses sync MISS/DIFF/SYNC and match MISMATCH/MATCH in remarks.
backend/data/premium_definitions.json includes PREMI TIKET and PREMI ANGKUT PUPUK; use definitions/patterns as evidence instead of local rigid names.
frontend/src/pages/AggregationSeederPage.jsx uses Update Sync Status Manual Adj as the UI indicator source: SYNC is success/green, DIFF and MISS are warning/error conditions.

external_backend_allowed.when: Edit if /payroll/manual-adjustment/by-api-key or sync-status endpoint cannot return correct rows by adjustment_type alone.
external_backend_allowed.endpoint_rule: adjustment_type is the broad scope; adjustment_name is optional exact/narrow filter only when user sends it. Blank adjustment_name with adjustment_type=PREMI means all premium rows/subtypes.

input_eligibility_rule.notes: Explicit remarks tokens win over check-adtrans/sync-status heuristics before input.

conflict_notes: Recent workflow WFS-loosefruit-duplicate-cleanup is unrelated to manual adjustment premium logic.
Recent lite-plan month-filter-bug touches Manual Adjustment API params; check uncommitted changes before editing app/core/api_client.py or app/ui/main_window.py.
Recent lite-plan division-monitor-reset touches division monitor/compare-adtrans, not core premium fetch unless shared helpers change.
